title: fix --authfile auto-update test
body:
The test started to fail in gating and on workstations.  It turned out that pushing the test image to the registry recompresses it which in turn may change the digest.  The digest now started to change; computing it depends on the toolchain so the test passed before by pure luck it seems.

Finally, be sure to sign commits with your real name. Since by opening
a PR you already have commits, you can add signatures if needed with
something like `git commit -s --amend`.
-->

> I'm still uncomfortable with not understanding why/when it passes sometimes, but LGTM

In fact, it's always failed to run 255-auto-update.bats individually for downstream podman-4.6.1-4.module+el8.9.0+19761+326da906 on RHEL 8.9 and podman-4.6.1-5.el9 on RHEL 9.3, it has a test dependency
on 150-login.bats.
